source_documents.sourceTitle: CSB Investigation: Cuisine Solutions Ammonia Release
source_documents.verificationEvidence: Cuisine Solutions Ammonia Release | CSB Skip to main content Cuisine Solutions Ammonia Release Print Home | Investigation Details Accident Description Accident: Cuisine Solutions Ammonia Release Location: Location: Sterling, VA Accident Occurred On: 07/31/2024 | Final Report Released On: 09/25/2025 Accident Type: Release Investigation Status: The CSB's final report was released on September 25, 2025. A July 31, 2024, ammonia release at Cuisine Solutions, Inc., a food processing facility in Loudon County, VA led to forty people being evaluated at local hospitals. Of those, four were admitted, one to the Intensive Care Unit. The facility is a commercial food preparation plant with approximately 350 employees located about 30 miles from Washington D.C. FINAL REPORT: Cuisine Solutions - Spanish Version FINAL
source_documents.reviewerNotes: Promoted from HARVEST-0005 by explicit review decision. Preview only; verified pool not modified.

source_documents.sourceTitle: CSB Investigation: Didion Milling Company Explosion and Fire
source_documents.verificationEvidence: Didion Milling Company Explosion and Fire | CSB Skip to main content Didion Milling Company Explosion and Fire Print Home | Investigation Details Accident Description Accident: Didion Milling Company Explosion and Fire Location: Location: Cambria, WI Accident Occurred On: 05/31/2017 | Final Report Released On: 12/06/2023 Accident Type: Combustible Dust Explosion and Fire Investigation Status: The CSB's final report was released on December 6, 2023. On May 31, 2017, combustible dust explosions at the Didion Milling facility in Cambria, Wisconsin, killed five of the 19 employees working on the night of the incident. The other 14 were injured. FINAL REPORT: Fatal Combustible Dust Explosions at Didion Milling Inc. --> Final Reports FINAL REPORT: Fatal Combustible Dust Explosions at Didion Milling
source_documents.reviewerNotes: Promoted from HARVEST-0006 by explicit review decision. Preview only; verified pool not modified.

source_documents.sourceTitle: CSB Investigation: Loy-Lange Box Company Pressure Vessel Explosion
source_documents.verificationEvidence: Loy Lange Box Company Pressure Vessel Explosion | CSB Skip to main content Loy Lange Box Company Pressure Vessel Explosion Print Home | Investigation Details Accident Description Accident: Loy Lange Box Company Pressure Vessel Explosion Location: Location: St. Louis , MO Accident Occurred On: 04/03/2017 | Final Report Released On: 07/29/2022 Accident Type: Community Impact Investigation Status: The CSB's final report was released at a public meeting on 7.29.2022. A massive steam explosion caused a steel vessel weighing approximately 2,000 pounds to launch itself into the air. The initial explosion killed one worker and critically injured another. The vessel flew several hundred feet and landed on a nearby company, fatally injuring three members of the public. FINAL REPORT: Loy-Lange Final
source_documents.reviewerNotes: Promoted from HARVEST-0007 by explicit review decision. Preview only; verified pool not modified.

source_documents.sourceTitle: CSB Investigation: AB Specialty Silicones, LLC
source_documents.verificationEvidence: AB Specialty Silicones, LLC | CSB Skip to main content AB Specialty Silicones, LLC Print Home | Investigation Details Accident Description Accident: AB Specialty Silicones, LLC Location: Location: Waukegan, IL Accident Occurred On: 05/03/2019 | Final Report Released On: 09/24/2021 Accident Type: Release Investigation Status: The CSB's final report was approved at a public board meeting on Friday September 24, 2021. The final report will be posted shortly. On Friday May 3, 2019, a massive explosion and fire occurred at the AB Specialty Silicones facility in Waukegan, IL, killing four workers and causing extensive damage to nearby businesses. FINAL REPORT: AB Specialties Final Report FINAL REPORT: Public Board Meeting Staff Presentation --> Final Reports FINAL REPORT: AB Specialties Final Report
source_documents.reviewerNotes: Promoted from HARVEST-0008 by explicit review decision. Preview only; verified pool not modified.

source_hazard_lessons.hazardDescription: Warehouse worker dies after falling 12 feet from a pallet raised on forklift forks.
Construction worker killed when an unprotected trench collapsed and buried him.
Forklift driver pinned under overturned forklift after backing over loading dock edge.
CSB investigation into Cuisine Solutions ammonia release at food processing facility.
CSB investigation into Didion Milling combustible dust explosions and fire.
CSB investigation into pressure vessel explosion at Loy-Lange Box Company.
CSB investigation into AB Specialty Silicones explosion and fire.
NIOSH confined space incident involving two worker fatalities in a storage tank.
Machine operator dies after head crushed in flatbed thermoforming machine.

source_controls.controlText: Provide fall protection for elevated work
Keep workers out of unprotected trenches
Train forklift operators on overturn hazards
Strengthen emergency response and ventilation controls
Maintain explosion prevention and housekeeping programs
Verify mechanical integrity of pressure systems
Strengthen hazard analysis and emergency planning
Prevent unplanned rescue entry without proper equipment
Use lockout before clearing or servicing equipment
Train operators on machine hazard zones
